query:
insert into ManuallyVerifiedRequirements (
                    last_collect_nr,
                    req_id,
                    product_id,
                    review_name,
                    review_date,
                    comment_hash
                )
                values (
                    $1,
                    $2,
                    $3,
                    $4,
                    $5,
                    $6
                )
                on conflict (product_id, req_id, review_name, review_date)
                do update set
                    last_collect_nr = excluded.last_collect_nr,
                    comment_hash = excluded.comment_hash
